properties.remark: DELAYED PUBLIC WEB REPORT. TORNADO CAUSED DAMAGE TO HOUSE, TAKING THE PORCH AND PARTIAL ROOF OFF. 4X4 POSTS WERE DRIVEN INTO THE ROOF IN FRONT OF THE HOUSE. TIME IS BASED ON RADAR ESTIMATE.

DELAYED PUBLIC WEB REPORT. CORRECTED FOR TIME OF OCCURRENCE BASED ON DAMAGE SURVEY. TORNADO CAUSED DAMAGE TO HOUSE, TAKING THE PORCH AND PARTIAL ROOF OFF. 4X4 POSTS WERE DRIVEN INTO THE ROOF IN FRONT OF THE HOUSE.
DELAYED REPORT: 52 MPH GUST FROM NEARBY THUNDERSTORM OVERTURNED A TRACTOR TRAILER ON INTERSTATE 10 AT MILE MARKER 9.
ROOF OF CHAPARRAL MIDDLE SCHOOL'S BAND BUILDING WAS TORN OFF. TIME ESTIMATED.
59MPH WIND GUST AT THE DEMMING MUNICIPAL AIRPORT ASOS.
TACTICAL WEATHER SENSOR BLOWN DOWN AT HOLLOMAN AIR FOREC BASE.
STREETS FLOODING THROUGHOUT TRUTH OF CONSEQUENCES. NEAR ZERO VISIBILITY IN HEAVY RAIN AND PEA SIZE HAIL.
EXTENSIVE FLASH FLOODING OF ROADS AND BUILDINGS. 3+ RAINFALL IN ONE HOUR. CAR WASHED OFF ROAD. MULTIPLE HOMES EVACUATED. RIO GRANDE THREATENING TO EXIT BANKS. ELEPHANT BUTTE DAM BEING CLOSED.
MP 12 OBS SITE. WIND GUST FROM THUNDERSTORM MOVING DOWN FROM THE NORTH.
WSMR MESONET SITE RITA. THUNDERSTORM MOVED DOWN FROM THE NORTH.

NUMEROUS TREES AND POWER POLES DOWN IN THE NORTHEAST PORTION OF LAS CRUCES. AS OF 8AM MONDAY, STILL 500 CUSTOMERS WITHOUT POWER. WIND GUST FROM MESONET SITE ON RIDGE NORTH OF US70 AND EAST OF I-25. PEA SIZE HAIL ALSO REPORTED.
SPOTTER REPORTED GOLFBALL SIZE HAIL AT HIS HOME, AND HEAVY RAINFALL. HAIL HAD COVERED THE GROUND.
LARGE 12 INCH WIDE TREE LIMBS DOWNED. TIME ESTIMATED.
